candidate_triples.justification: The chunk text lists several alarm messages (e.g., 3001‑3005) whose effect is described as "Alarm with program interruption, stopping of axes and spindles." This indicates that the alarm event (AlarmMessage) causes the mechanical components (axes and spindles) to stop. Thus the relation candidate connects the AlarmMessage event to the MechanicalComponent entity.
